package.name: livox_v2_to_v1_republish
package.description: Namespace-only republisher that forwards livox_ros_driver2/CustomMsg messages (as recorded in M3DGR Mid-360 bags) onto a new topic typed as livox_ros_driver/CustomMsg. Exploits the fact that the two message definitions share the same MD5 (e4d6829bdfe657cb6c21a746c86b21a6), so the wire bytes are identical and no field-level transformation is performed.
